title: moraea nubigena
intro: Moraea nubigena, also known as the mountain iris, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Iridaceae. The medicinal properties of Moraea nubigena are attributed to its roots, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Moraea nubigena include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Moraea nubigena typically involve drying and crushing the roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications.
